summary: Iteration 23 retest of Module 7 (Per-Service Barber Assignment on Modify Booking). Backend pytest suite: 11/11 hard tests pass (1 soft-skip for incentives by design). Frontend regressions and the two iteration-22 bugs all resolved.
critical_code_review_comments: EnhancedSalonDashboard.js is ~3052 lines — consider splitting the Modify Booking dialog into its own component for maintainability (DRY/file-size).
Subtotal guard now correctly prevents zero-amount saves; consider also disabling Save while serviceAssignments is still loading (currently the in-handler toast covers this fallback).
test_credentials: Salon admin: identifier='admin', password='salon123'. Customer phone 7503070727.
seed_data_creation: Created test token id=login-builder-10 (customer 'TEST M7 FE Modify', services Haircut+Beard, total ₹276) via /app/tests/setup_test_token.py. Ensured salon services 36ab7dd7 (Haircut) and c904dc04 (Beard) are enabled for salon 62609c3d-…
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_module7_modify_booking.py is the regression authority (11 hard + 1 soft-skip). Frontend dialog behaviour verified via Playwright against the live preview URL: subtotal renders >0 within 300ms of dialog open (Bug #1 fixed), assignment-name elements render human-readable names (Bug #2 fixed), bidirectional discount sync works, main-barber overwrite + per-line override works, Save end-to-end produces a token whose total_amount = subtotal*(1-discount). Backend backward-compat (PUT with only final_amount=existing total) is non-destructive — subtotal becomes resolved sum, discount = max(0, sub-final), total = final. To recreate the test token, run python /app/tests/setup_test_token.py (it cancels any existing waiting token for 7503070727 first).

test_results_detail.bug1_subtotal_zero_dataloss: FIXED — subtotal=₹276 at 300ms, stays ₹276 at 700ms; save-btn enabled; backward-compat PUT keeps total_amount unchanged at ₹276.
test_results_detail.bug2_uuid_as_name: FIXED — assignment-name-36ab7dd7 shows 'Haircut', assignment-name-c904dc04 shows 'Beard Trim' (no UUIDs, no 'undefined').
test_results_detail.save_button_guard: Verified by code inspection at line 2429 (disabled={modifySubtotal === 0}). UI cannot trivially zero via real flow now; visual confirmation skipped as instructed.
test_results_detail.main_barber_overwrite_regression: Changing modify-main-barber-select propagates to both assignment-barber-* selects ✓. Changing one assignment line independently leaves the other on the main ✓.
test_results_detail.save_e2e_regression: PUT /api/tokens/{id}/modify with 2-barber split (₹400+₹600) + 10% discount → subtotal=1000, total=900, disc%=10; GET confirms service_assignments persisted with correct barber_ids ✓.
test_results_detail.backward_compat_regression: PUT with only final_amount=276 (existing total) → subtotal resolves to 276, order_discount_amount=0, total stays 276, service_assignments intact ✓.

rca_of_the_issue: Iteration 22's two FE bugs were caused by (a) opening the Modify dialog before the per-barber price cache and allServices were populated, so the first render computed subtotal from missing prices (=0); (b) the assignment row name used a fallback that included the raw service_id when allServices wasn't ready. Iteration 23 fix preloads barber prices via Promise.all, awaits fetchAllServices, and seeds explicit prices into serviceAssignments BEFORE opening the dialog; name element now falls back to literal 'Service'. Verified live.
